description: Fixed benchmark tasks for Agent Harness v1. Fresh copies of each fixture repo are required for every run.

tasks.prompt: In the README fixture, replace the placeholder opening sentence with 'This fixture is a locked benchmark workspace.'
tasks.expected_artifact: README.md opening sentence is locked benchmark workspace text
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'This fixture is a locked benchmark workspace.' in text"

tasks.prompt: Replace the first README bullet with a sentence that says the benchmark schema and baseline are fixed.
tasks.expected_artifact: README.md contains the schema and baseline note
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'schema and baseline are fixed' in text"

tasks.prompt: Replace the second README bullet with a sentence about deterministic file ordering.
tasks.expected_artifact: README.md contains the deterministic file ordering note
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'deterministic file ordering' in text.lower()"

tasks.prompt: In sample.txt, replace beta with beta-locked.
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('sample.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'beta-locked' in text and '\nbeta\n' not in text"

tasks.prompt: In sample.txt, replace gamma with gamma-locked.
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('sample.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert 'gamma-locked' in text"

tasks.prompt: In sample.txt, replace placeholder with delta.
tasks.verifier: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text = Path('sample.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8').rstrip('\n'); assert text.endswith('delta')"
